_comment: ATL 2024-08-16 evening convective ground stop. 21:xx peak mean 57.7 min (p50=42, p95=100 — highly skewed distribution). Clearance hold reaches runway threshold ~25 min after scheduled departure at ATL. Increased std for GS phase to capture the long right tail; recovery phase raised to match 22:xx actuals (33 min).

programs.description: Pre-stop buildup — departure rate reducing as storms approach
Full ground stop — active convective weather, runway operations suspended/restricted
Post-stop recovery — backlog still present as operations resume
